description: Pokémon Blue Memory Identifiers (from pret/pokered and Data Crystal)

wMapLevel.purpose: Current internal map ID (e.g. Pallet Town = 0x00).

wCurrentMenuItem.purpose: Currently selected main menu item (topmost is 0). 0x00 means cursor is on 'CONTINUE' (if save exists) or 'NEW GAME'.

wJoyIgnore.purpose: A bitmask applied to the key port for the current menu/state. When zero, the engine accepts all joypad input. During movies or cutscenes, it disables input.

wBattleState.purpose: Type of battle. 0 = Overworld, 1 = Wild Pokémon, 2 = Trainer, 3 = Safari Zone.

wPartyCount.purpose: Number of Pokémon in the player's party. Accurate reading implies the save file has successfully populated WRAM.

wYCoord.purpose: Player's Y screen location coordinate on the current map.

wXCoord.purpose: Player's X screen location coordinate on the current map.
